## Description
A clear and concise description of the changes proposed in this Pull Request.

## Related Issues
Closes #[issue number]

## Mathematical/Scientific Details
If applicable, describe the formulas or algorithms added/modified, and references.

## Verification & Testing Done
Detail the testing performed to verify changes:
- [ ] Compiled with GCC / NVCC on [OS]
- [ ] Run test suite (`make test` or `ctest`)
- [ ] Check for memory safety (`Valgrind` / `ASan`)
- [ ] Performance benchmark status (FPS, Latency)

## Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the code style guides of this project (`Linux kernel` for C/CUDA, `PEP 8` for Python).
- [ ] I have updated the documentation (`docs/`) and added Doxygen comments to public API functions.
- [ ] I have updated `CHANGELOG.md` with a summary of my changes.
- [ ] New and existing tests pass locally with my changes.
